FLOW.COMMENT: addFxEnvelope - wrap content8 in an fxEnvelope and save as content9

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: addFxEnvelope - wrap payload in an fxEnvelope and return as envString
This service will put the input payload string into a standard fxEnvelope with one of 2 styles:
style1 - the standard and most appropriate way to put content under body/payload as a string of data
style2 - the non-traditional inline xml put under body (commonly used with Liaison - note: input payload must be an XML-formatted string)
style3 - the non-traditional way to put content under just body as a string of data (no payload)
The service builds the fxEnvelope as follows:
header/message exchangeID=IP Exchange messageID=trans id subject/payloadType/version=input parms

Values.value: Receiver envelope values are: TP_ALIAS: %sAttrReceiverAlias% subject=%subject% payloadType=%payloadType% version=%version% sPfromOrg=%sPfromOrg% sPfromLoc=%sPfromLoc% sPfromSystem=%sPfromSystem% sPtoOrg=%sPtoOrg% sPtoLoc=%sPtoLoc% sPtoSystem=%sPtoSystem%

MAP.COMMENT: create a new fxEnvelope (without the payload)

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0560 Invalid fxEnvelope cannot be sent to Liaison/OpenText - please specify the subject, payloadType and version

Values.value: FE0560 Invalid fxEnvelope cannot be sent to Liaison/OpenText - please specify the subject, payloadType and version

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0561 Invalid fxEnvelope cannot be sent to Liaison/OpenText - please specify the from/orgID and from/locationID

Values.value: FE0561 Invalid fxEnvelope cannot be sent to Liaison/OpenText - please specify the from/orgID and from/locationID

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0562 Invalid fxEnvelope cannot be sent to Liaison/OpenText - please specify the to/orgID and to/locationID

Values.value: FE0562 Invalid fxEnvelope cannot be sent to Liaison/OpenText - please specify the to/orgID and to/locationID

MAP.COMMENT: add the content as a traditional string payload
add the document as an inline xml payload to fxEnvelope
add the content as a non-traditional string body

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0563 Invalid style '%style%' - please select from picklist

Values.value: FE0563 Invalid style '%style%' - please select from picklist
